semantic_blueprint.root_cause_hypothesis: Insufficient check for available memory before allocation, potentially leading to out-of-bounds access.
semantic_blueprint.fix_logic: Added a check to ensure that the last allocated block has enough memory to satisfy the request before returning false.
semantic_blueprint.patch_intent_summary: Ensure safe memory allocation by validating available memory against requested bytes.

hunk_chain.summary: Introduced a check to validate if the requested bytes exceed the available memory and if the last allocated block can satisfy the request.

hunk_application.agent_evaluation: Hunks applied successfully to all target files.
